Stage 3 (frontend legacy strip) scheduled today. Track B5 (backend Clerk JWT verification) deferred — couples with WS-02 cutover.

workstreams.title: Track H4 — apps/accounts/ Next.js host for accounts.paperworklabs.com
workstreams.notes: CANCELLED 2026-04-28 post-incident: Clerk hosts the Account Portal natively at accounts.clerk.services; production DNS is a CNAME to Clerk, not a separate Vercel Next.js app. The apps/accounts scaffold + Vercel `accounts` project were created under a misunderstanding. Decommission tracked as WS-36; DNS automation + monitoring as WS-37.

workstreams.title: Track H1 — satellite DNS (accounts.paperworklabs.com CNAME)
workstreams.notes: Superseded 2026-04-28: production CNAME for accounts.paperworklabs.com must target accounts.clerk.services (Clerk Account Portal), not cname.vercel-dns.com. Incident + recovery: docs/runbooks/CLERK_DNS_INCIDENT_2026-04-28.md. WS-37 adds automated reconcile + pre-deploy guard.

workstreams.title: Track I4 — Studio /admin/infrastructure full Render+Vercel probe coverage
workstreams.notes: Studio /admin/infrastructure now has Vercel + GitHub Actions + Render quota panels (PR #351). All three monitor APIs from Brain are mounted and reading live. Render personal-account services suspended 2026-04-27. Awaiting first 24h of quota-snapshot data for Vercel Pro decision.

workstreams.notes: Batches 1+2+3 all merged. PR #350 ported the final cron-portable workflows (cpa-tax-review, partnership-outreach-drafter). Three remaining n8n workflows are non-cron (webhook-driven, error triggers, slash commands) and intentionally not migrated — they stay in n8n.

workstreams.title: Workstreams board (Track Z) — Studio UI + Brain dispatcher
workstreams.notes: Schema + seed (#312), Studio UI (#315), dispatcher + reorder router (#316), agent-sprint-runner workflow_dispatch (#317). PR #325 added writeback service. PR #349 fixed compute_snapshot_status bug (pending → in_progress promotion). PR #356 made /admin/workstreams real-time fetch from Brain. PR #357 fixed APScheduler misfire (Postgres SSL). PR #360 fixed worker-race in writeback (Redis lock + idempotent branch). 19:15 UTC tick is the autonomy validation.

workstreams.title: Track L — secrets rotation (PAT, Slack token, Hetzner creds)
workstreams.notes: GitHub PAT expires 2026-06-27; BFG git history scrub after rotations.

workstreams.title: Vercel auto-promote unblocked (jq norm/0 bug fixed)
workstreams.notes: def norm(s) was being invoked as ($HEAD|norm) which jq parses as norm/0 (undefined). Every push to main since the regex script was last edited had been silently failing all promote legs since 2026-04-24. PR #319 fixed by switching to norm($HEAD) / norm($MERGE). Studio production aliased to main HEAD on 2026-04-28; distill build re-triggered; launchfree/filefree/trinkets queued for next path-relevant PR.

workstreams.title: Per-app favicons (replace shared paperclip across 6 apps)
workstreams.notes: Per-app favicon sweep landed. PR #334.

Zone IDs: paperworklabs.com 6efe0c9f87c80a21617ff040fa2e55dd; others in docs/runbooks/CLOUDFLARE_OWNERSHIP.md. NS janet+noel; Spaceship updated; resolvers OK; HTTP 200 all domains. Brain API token in vault+Render+GHA. Delete former personal-account migrated zones after 24h soak ~2026-04-29 21Z.

workstreams.title: Brain pre-deploy guard (quota + env-var + Clerk DNS pre-flight before Vercel deploy)
workstreams.notes: Quota + required Vercel env manifest via scripts/check_pre_deploy.py (PR #365). Extended 2026-04-28 (WS-37): for studio/axiomfolio/filefree the guard also runs scripts/reconcile_clerk_dns.py --check-only so Cloudflare DNS drift cannot pass while Vercel env vars look fine. vercel-cutover-axiomfolio.yml supplies CLERK_SECRET_KEY + CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

Do NOT remove the Cloudflare Single Redirect for accounts.paperworklabs.com until Clerk custom hostname is healthy — see docs/runbooks/CLERK_DNS_INCIDENT_2026-04-28.md.

workstreams.title: Clerk DNS auto-reconcile + Brain monitor + pre-deploy enforcement
workstreams.notes: Ships scripts/reconcile_clerk_dns.py (Clerk API cname_targets + Cloudflare reconcile/check-only), wires check_pre_deploy.py for studio/axiomfolio/filefree, APScheduler clerk_dns_reconcile_watch every 30m with Slack alert on drift, Dockerfile COPY for Render, and incident runbook docs/runbooks/CLERK_DNS_INCIDENT_2026-04-28.md.

workstreams.title: Tighten DMARC to p=reject after 30-day soak
workstreams.notes: Due 2026-05-28 (low). After SPF+DMARC (quarantine) soak, review DMARC reports; if clean, set p=reject via scripts/dns_set_spf_dmarc.py. Confirm Clerk/Postmark alignment if any auth failures.

workstreams.title: Workstream + sprint accuracy (Brain derive, freshness, auto-close)
workstreams.notes: Single PR: writeback updated_at + board envelope, GitHub-derived percent with override_percent, Studio KPIs/pending + freshness banners, sprint auto-close from closes_pr_urls / closes_workstreams.

workstreams.title: Cloudflare per-zone token rollout
workstreams.notes: Issue per-zone DNS Read tokens via scripts/cloudflare_issue_readonly_tokens.py (manual post-merge); apis/brain/app/services/cloudflare_client.py prefers CLOUDFLARE_READONLY_TOKEN_* for reads and falls back to CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. Migrate remaining read-only consumers (DNS health checks, reconcile_clerk_dns.py --check-only, future infra dashboard) off the account-wide token.

workstreams.title: Decommission old Cloudflare personal account
workstreams.notes: After soak + production health on the work account, run scripts/cloudflare_decommission_zones.py (dry-run then --apply) with CLOUDFLARE_OLD_API_TOKEN to remove duplicate zones from the former personal account. Runbook: docs/runbooks/CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_DECOMMISSION.md.

workstreams.title: Phase A — IaC drift detector (infra/state/*.yaml canonical, 30-min cron)
workstreams.notes: scripts/check_infra_drift.py runs every 30 min; for each surface (Vercel envs, Cloudflare DNS+rulesets, Clerk domain config, Render env vars), diff live API state vs infra/state/<surface>.yaml. Auto-revert UI-only changes; file reconcile PR for semantic surfaces.

workstreams.title: Phase A — Brain freshness surface in /admin/overview
workstreams.notes: /api/v1/admin/system-health returns {writeback_last_run, last_pr_opened, last_drift_check, scheduler_skew, queue_depth, brain_paused}. Studio Overview shows live tiles.

workstreams.title: Phase B — Brain graduated self-merge (data files first, N=50 to graduate to brain code)
workstreams.notes: Allowlist in apis/brain/data/brain_self_merge_paths.yaml (data-files first). Auto-promote to apis/brain/ after 50 clean merges with zero unreverted reverts. Track record in self_merge_promotions.json. PR #391: graduation tier logic + gate + promotion scheduler. Auto-merge action wiring in follow-up; current behavior is gate-only enforcement.

workstreams.title: Phase B — Brain pause/resume kill switch (file flag + Vercel Edge Config)
workstreams.notes: apis/brain/data/brain_paused.flag (committed) OR Vercel Edge Config flag. Schedulers no-op when flagged. Studio shows red 'BRAIN PAUSED' banner. CLI: brain pause / brain resume.

workstreams.title: Phase B — Brain auto-revert on post-merge CI failure (30-min window)
workstreams.notes: When Brain-merged PR is followed by main CI failure within 30 min, auto-opens revert PR + auto-merges. Incident logged to apis/brain/data/incidents.json. Track record feeds WS-44 graduation gate.

workstreams.title: Phase C — Per-zone Cloudflare write tokens (extend WS-39 to scoped write + auto-rotation)
workstreams.notes: Build on the per-zone readonly tokens shipped in #373. Issue scoped WRITE tokens per apex zone. Brain rotates monthly via scheduled job.

workstreams.title: Phase C — apps/accounts/ + Vercel project decommission (already drafted as WS-36)
workstreams.notes: Delete apps/accounts/ + Vercel project (already drafted in PR #372 as WS-36). Reclaims Vercel project slot. Was based on misunderstanding — Clerk hosts Account Portal natively.

workstreams.title: Phase D — Anomaly detection on workstream writeback
workstreams.notes: Detect: workstream count drop >10%, completed-then-regressed, PR open >7 days with green CI. Escalate via #brain-asks.

workstreams.title: Phase D — Sprint velocity (derive from PR merge cadence + sprint goals)
workstreams.notes: Forecast next sprint capacity from last-N sprint PR merge cadence + workstream completion rate. Surfaces in Studio sprint board.

workstreams.title: Phase D — Knowledge-graph self-validation (24h cron, auto-reconcile)
workstreams.notes: Brain checks: do workstreams reference real PRs? sprints reference real workstreams? runbooks reference real scripts? Drift = auto-reconcile PR.

workstreams.title: Phase D — Slack streamline: 11+ posters → 3 channels + inbound bot
workstreams.notes: Audit 11+ existing schedulers posting Slack messages; consolidate to 3 channels. Add inbound Slack bot (apis/brain/app/services/slack_outbound.py needs companion slack_inbound.py). Persona posts (CFO, growth, partnerships) post as DRAFTS in #brain-status.

workstreams.title: Phase E — docs/infra/REGISTRY.md (every prod surface with owner/runbook/drift/kill-switch)
workstreams.notes: Every surface (DNS zone, Vercel project, Render service, Clerk app, n8n workflow, Postgres, Redis): owner, runbook link, drift detector status, kill switch path, on-call escalation.

workstreams.title: Phase E — Runbook completeness audit (every registry entry has runbook)
workstreams.notes: Every WS-54 registry entry must have a runbook covering: outage diagnosis, rollback, common breakage modes. Template: docs/runbooks/CLERK_DNS_INCIDENT_2026-04-28.md.

workstreams.title: Phase E — Cost monitor unification + 'infra is done' signoff gate
workstreams.notes: Extend WS-43 with monthly cost projections (Vercel + Render + Cloudflare + Clerk + Postmark + AI tokens). Founder warning when projected to exceed configured threshold. Drives the L4 handoff signoff.

workstreams.title: Phase E — Stack audit UPGRADE/REPLACE PRs (sequenced from Phase A0 verdicts)
workstreams.notes: Sequenced PRs implementing UPGRADE/REPLACE verdicts from docs/STACK_AUDIT_2026-Q2.md. REPLACE migrations may overflow the 48h blitz and become Phase H Brain-self-prioritized via long_tail.json.

workstreams.title: Phase F — pwl new-app CLI (Next.js/FastAPI/Brain templates, end-to-end PR)
workstreams.notes: PR #388 landed the CLI shell, doctor, list-apps, and new-app command surface. WS-59 completed the working API scaffold implementation.

workstreams.title: Phase F — Template authoring kit (how to add a new pwl template)
workstreams.notes: PR #392 landed the API template authoring kit and working pwl new-app --type api scaffold. Existing-app onboarding is WS-60.

workstreams.title: Phase F — Onboard existing apps to platform templates
workstreams.notes: PR <num>: pwl onboard + registry-build + Brain reader. Phase F complete pending founder green-light.

workstreams.title: Phase G1 — docs/strategy/OBJECTIVES.yaml manifest + Brain reader (rolling cadence + adaptive nudge)
workstreams.notes: Founder writes when motivated; Brain reads continuously. apis/brain/app/services/strategic_planner.py decomposes into candidate workstreams. File edit triggers re-decomposition within 1h. If untouched for review_cadence days, Brain pings #brain-asks.

workstreams.title: Phase G1 — Outcome measurement loop (PR ROI at 7/14/30 days)
workstreams.notes: Every Brain-merged PR tagged with closes_workstreams: [WS-XX]. Brain measures (a) immediate impact (CI pass, deploy success) and (b) lagging impact (objective metric movement at 7/14/30 days). Stored in apis/brain/data/pr_outcomes.json (foundation file already exists). Surfaces as 'PR ROI' in Studio.

workstreams.title: Brain self-prioritization service and daily candidate scheduler
workstreams.notes: PR <num>: Brain proposes daily candidates from signals; founder promotes via admin endpoint. Studio review UI in WS-64 sister PR or follow-up.

workstreams.title: WS-64 Brain self-improvement loop
workstreams.notes: PR #398: weekly retro service + scheduler. Closes Phase G2 (L5 seed). Studio retro tile is follow-up.

workstreams.title: Phase G1 — Procedural memory ('when X, do Y' rules; extends episodic + semantic memory)
workstreams.notes: Stored at apis/brain/data/procedural_memory.yaml (foundation seeded with 4 rules from #372/#373/#374 retros). Source: post-incident retros (auto from incidents.json + Brain self-revert) get distilled into procedure rules. Used by strategic_planner.py to bias decomposition.

workstreams.title: Phase A0 — Stack truth audit (read-only KEEP/UPGRADE/REPLACE verdicts)
workstreams.notes: Output docs/STACK_AUDIT_2026-Q2.md with KEEP/UPGRADE/REPLACE verdicts per layer. Read-only — no infra changes. Feeds Phase E WS-57 upgrade PRs. Audit doc landed in PR; awaiting founder verdict review.

workstreams.title: Phase G+ — Paperwork Operating Score (POS) north-star composite
workstreams.notes: 10-pillar composite (Autonomy/DORA/Stack/WebPerf/A11y/CodeQ/DataArch/RelSec/Knowledge/Persona). Weekly cron via app.schedulers.operating_score. 8/10 pillars measured: pillars 1+7 went live (real autonomy + data architecture collectors) in this PR. Bootstrap pillars: none. Studio gauge tile renders /admin/operating-score. Targets: L4>=80 all pillars>=70, L5>=90 sustained 4w. Spec at apis/brain/data/operating_score_spec.yaml.
